scripts.docker:up: npm run sync:contract-enums && docker compose up --build
scripts.docker:up:agent-only: npm run sync:contract-enums && docker compose -f docker-compose.agent-only.yml up --build
scripts.postinstall: pnpm install --prefix web && python -m pip install -r app/requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "python -m uvicorn main:app --app-dir app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 18410 --reload" "npm run dev --prefix web"
